response.justification: Bogdan is an experienced full-stack and product-oriented software developer with strong practices in TDD and distributed web systems, but he does not meet the minimum qualifications for this role. The most critical gap is the 8-year C++ requirement — the resume shows only a brief stint (~6 months) writing C/C++ components at National Instruments and a bachelor thesis project using C++. Additionally, his background is primarily in web, mobile, and product engineering rather than cloud compute infrastructure or platform engineering, and there is no evidence of sustained technical leadership in cloud or DevOps contexts.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship culture: demonstrated TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and pairing practices across multiple roles
High-scale systems exposure at Dunnhumby — micro-services handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency, async I/O design
Broad technology range and adaptability, including Kubernetes, AWS CDK, and open-source platform ownership with GISCollective
concerns: C++ experience is negligible (~6 months at National Instruments plus a thesis project) versus the 8-year minimum requirement — the single largest disqualifying factor
No substantive cloud compute platform or infrastructure engineering background; experience skews heavily toward application and product layers
No demonstrated technical leadership in a cloud or DevOps engineering organization; Staff roles were individual-contributor-oriented rather than platform-lead positions

key_factors.factor: Strong software craftsmanship and distributed systems exposure
